mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lawyer (user_id, license_no, law_firm, bio, status, practice_years, rating, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{licenseNo}, #{lawFirm}, #{bio}, #{status}, #{practiceYears}, #{rating}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT l.lawyer_id, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, l.bio AS description, l.create_time, NULL AS update_time, l.license_no, u.avatar_url, u.phone, u.auth_status AS audit_status, NULL AS audit_remark, v.real_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM evaluation e WHERE e.lawyer_id = l.lawyer_id AND e.status = 'normal') AS review_count, (SELECT e.content FROM evaluation e WHERE e.lawyer_id = l.lawyer_id AND e.status = 'normal' AND e.content IS NOT NULL AND e.content != '' ORDER BY e.created_time DESC LIMIT 1) AS latest_review_content, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT s.name) AS specialty, COALESCE(JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT('id', s.specialty_id, 'specialtyId', s.specialty_id, 'name', s.name)), JSON_ARRAY()) AS specialties FROM lawyer l INNER JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN users_verfications v ON l.user_id = v.user_id LEFT JOIN lawyer_specialty ls ON l.lawyer_id = ls.lawyer_id LEFT JOIN specialty s ON ls.specialty_id = s.specialty_id WHERE u.auth_status = 2 AND l.status = 1 GROUP BY l.lawyer_id, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, l.bio, l.create_time, l.license_no, u.avatar_url, u.phone, u.auth_status, v.real_name

SELECT l.lawyer_id, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, l.bio AS description, l.create_time, NULL AS update_time, l.license_no, u.avatar_url, u.phone, u.auth_status AS audit_status, NULL AS audit_remark, v.real_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM evaluation e WHERE e.lawyer_id = l.lawyer_id AND e.status = 'normal') AS review_count, (SELECT e.content FROM evaluation e WHERE e.lawyer_id = l.lawyer_id AND e.status = 'normal' AND e.content IS NOT NULL AND e.content != '' ORDER BY e.created_time DESC LIMIT 1) AS latest_review_content, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT s.name) AS specialty, COALESCE(JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT('id', s.specialty_id, 'specialtyId', s.specialty_id, 'name', s.name)), JSON_ARRAY()) AS specialties FROM lawyer l INNER JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN users_verfications v ON l.user_id = v.user_id LEFT JOIN lawyer_specialty ls ON l.lawyer_id = ls.lawyer_id LEFT JOIN specialty s ON ls.specialty_id = s.specialty_id WHERE l.lawyer_id = #{lawyerId} AND u.auth_status = 2 AND l.status = 1 GROUP BY l.lawyer_id, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, l.bio, l.create_time, l.license_no, u.avatar_url, u.phone, u.auth_status, v.real_name

SELECT l.lawyer_id, v.real_name, u.avatar_url, u.phone, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, u.auth_status AS audit_status, NULL AS audit_remark, l.bio AS description, l.create_time, NULL AS update_time, l.license_no, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM evaluation e WHERE e.lawyer_id = l.lawyer_id AND e.status = 'normal') AS review_count, (SELECT e.content FROM evaluation e WHERE e.lawyer_id = l.lawyer_id AND e.status = 'normal' AND e.content IS NOT NULL AND e.content != '' ORDER BY e.created_time DESC LIMIT 1) AS latest_review_content, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT s.name) AS specialty, COALESCE(JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT('id', s.specialty_id, 'specialtyId', s.specialty_id, 'name', s.name)), JSON_ARRAY()) AS specialties FROM lawyer l INNER JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN users_verfications v ON l.user_id = v.user_id LEFT JOIN lawyer_specialty ls ON l.lawyer_id = ls.lawyer_id LEFT JOIN specialty s ON ls.specialty_id = s.specialty_id WHERE u.auth_status = 2 AND l.status = 1 GROUP BY l.lawyer_id, v.real_name, u.avatar_url, u.phone, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, u.auth_status, l.bio, l.create_time, l.license_no ORDER BY l.rating DESC, l.practice_years DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DISTINCT l.lawyer_id, v.real_name, u.avatar_url, u.phone, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, u.auth_status AS audit_status, NULL AS audit_remark, l.bio AS description, l.create_time, NULL AS update_time, l.license_no, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT s.name) AS specialty, COALESCE(JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT('id', s.specialty_id, 'specialtyId', s.specialty_id, 'name', s.name)), JSON_ARRAY()) AS specialties FROM lawyer l INNER JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN users_verfications v ON l.user_id = v.user_id JOIN lawyer_specialty ls ON l.lawyer_id = ls.lawyer_id JOIN specialty s ON ls.specialty_id = s.specialty_id WHERE u.auth_status = 2 AND l.status = 1 AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{specialty}, '%') GROUP BY l.lawyer_id, v.real_name, u.avatar_url, u.phone, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, u.auth_status, l.bio, l.create_time, l.license_no

SELECT l.lawyer_id, v.real_name, u.avatar_url, u.phone, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, u.auth_status AS audit_status, NULL AS audit_remark, l.bio AS description, l.create_time, NULL AS update_time, l.license_no, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT s.name) AS specialty, COALESCE(JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT('id', s.specialty_id, 'specialtyId', s.specialty_id, 'name', s.name)), JSON_ARRAY()) AS specialties FROM lawyer l INNER JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN users_verfications v ON l.user_id = v.user_id LEFT JOIN lawyer_specialty ls ON l.lawyer_id = ls.lawyer_id LEFT JOIN specialty s ON ls.specialty_id = s.specialty_id WHERE u.auth_status = 1 GROUP BY l.lawyer_id, v.real_name, u.avatar_url, u.phone, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, u.auth_status, l.bio, l.create_time, l.license_no
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET auth_status = 2 WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM lawyer WHERE lawyer_id = #{lawyerId})
UPDATE users SET auth_status = 3 WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM lawyer WHERE lawyer_id = #{lawyerId})
